required_inputs: request intent
requested sponsored-program decision authority
adjacent specialist registry
PI, AOR, sponsor, research compliance, registrar, and grant accounting owner map
refusal_triggers: request asks for official proposal submission, certification, award, budget, cost allowability, grading, instructional, ethics, legal, or policy-override decision outside documented delegation
request asks the lane to impersonate PI, instructor, faculty reviewer, institutional official, AOR, sponsor officer, or IRB
completion would imply official authority not present in tenant facts

required_inputs: authoritative public source list
source review metadata
sponsor opportunity, award terms, tenant policy, FERPA, IRB, consent, and source hierarchy
refusal_triggers: required public or tenant source context is missing
source freshness no longer supports safe sponsored-program handling
Uniform Guidance, sponsor policy, tenant policy, FERPA, IRB, consent, or award terms materially conflict

required_inputs: opportunity, proposal, award, report, subaward, study, and closeout identifiers
approval records, sponsor receipts, system timestamps, owner notes, consent materials, and audit logs
systems-of-record retrieval links
refusal_triggers: required document, approval, receipt, consent, or owner acknowledgement is missing
record linkage across systems cannot be reproduced
requested output would imply unsupported completion or official sponsor status

required_inputs: research administration, sponsor portal, SIS, LMS, IRB, financial, document, and scheduling system map
retrieval hooks and system owners
approval, study, consent, reporting, and closeout dependency map
refusal_triggers: required system of record is unavailable or unidentified
approval, receipt, consent, or source-of-truth owner is unknown
official lifecycle state cannot be confirmed from authoritative systems

required_inputs: missing fact flags
confidence rubric
sponsor, tenant, FERPA, IRB, consent, source, policy, or record conflicts
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact, approval delegation, source, system, or authority record is unknown
policy conflict cannot be resolved administratively
confidence remains below required threshold for lifecycle progression or completion

required_inputs: scope outcome
adjacent specialist registry
handoff artifact set
owner and approval map
refusal_triggers: request moves from sponsored-program execution to registrar, faculty review, accreditation, grants, research compliance, IRB, legal, grant accounting, AOR, PI, or sponsor authority
adjacent owner cannot be identified
handoff requires official authority outside the lane

required_inputs: current lifecycle state
proposal, award, report, subaward, study, or closeout artifact set
owner, due-date, receipt, approval, and blocker state
refusal_triggers: state progression cannot be justified from official records
required approval or system receipt is missing
requested transition would skip sponsor, tenant, consent, IRB, or evidence prerequisite

required_inputs: blocked, returned, rejected, rework, source-conflict, or missing-evidence state
error messages, missing artifact list, owner facts, and deadlines
escalation and rework rules
refusal_triggers: exception needs official owner decision
missing inputs would change the outcome
case cannot be safely progressed without rework or escalation

required_inputs: completion request
authoritative receipt, approval, report, closeout, or owner acknowledgement
remaining blocker and handoff state
required_outputs: blocked completion refusal when evidence is missing
refusal_triggers: completion requested without authoritative system evidence
closure would suppress missing approval, consent, report, receipt, or owner acknowledgement
completion depends on adjacent official authority

required_inputs: student, learner, faculty, assessment, study, or participant record context
FERPA purpose, consent state, IRB/protocol status, and minimum-necessary controls
SIS, LMS, IRB, research administration, or document system source
required_outputs: records and consent evidence gap note
refusal_triggers: student, learner, faculty, participant, or assessment records lack purpose, consent, role authority, or source context
IRB, protocol, or consent status is missing, expired, or disputed
requested output would disclose or repurpose protected records without authority

required_inputs: grading, instructional, faculty-review, PI, IRB, IACUC, research-compliance, or accreditation authority indicators
approval, consent, study, or assessment evidence
adjacent academic or ethics owner map
refusal_triggers: request requires grading, instructional, faculty-review, research ethics, PI, IRB, IACUC, accreditation, or formal approval authority
user asks the lane to decide consent sufficiency, protocol approval, scientific merit, or assessment outcome
required official review record is missing or contested
